user_intent: What country generated the most money from SaaS Subscription?
failed_sql: SELECT u.country, SUM(f.revenue) AS total_revenue FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_users u ON f.user_id = u.user_id JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'SaaS Subscription' GROUP BY u.country ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 1;
error_message: AUTO-PATCHER: revenue -> profit swap
successful_sql: SELECT u.country, SUM(f.profit) AS total_profit FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_users u ON f.user_id = u.user_id JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'SaaS Subscription' GROUP BY u.country ORDER BY total_profit DESC LIMIT 1;

user_intent: Calculate the total sales value from products priced over 1000 dollars for the previous month.
failed_sql: SELECT SUM(f.revenue) FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.unit_price > 1000 AND f.sale_timestamp >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 1 MONTH);
error_message: AUTO-PATCHER: revenue -> profit swap
successful_sql: SELECT SUM(f.profit) FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.unit_price > 1000 AND f.sale_timestamp >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 1 MONTH);

user_intent: Calculate the total sales value from products priced over 1000 dollars for the previous month.
failed_sql: SELECT SUM(f.profit) FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.unit_price > 1000 AND f.sale_timestamp >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 1 MONTH);
error_message: Execution failed on sql 'SELECT SUM(f.profit) FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.unit_price > 1000 AND f.sale_timestamp >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 1 MONTH);': near "1": syntax error

user_intent: Calculate the total sales value from products priced over 1000 dollars for the previous month.
failed_sql: SELECT SUM(f.revenue) FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.unit_price > 1000 AND f.sale_timestamp >= DATE('now', '-1 month');
error_message: AUTO-PATCHER: revenue -> profit swap
successful_sql: SELECT SUM(f.profit) FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.unit_price > 1000 AND f.sale_timestamp >= DATE('now', '-1 month');
